session.user:
Run these checks and report results: 1. ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/cmux_checkout_workspace.py src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py tests/commands/pr/test_checkout_graphite_linking.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py 2. ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/cmux_checkout_workspace.py src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py tests/commands/pr/test_checkout_graphite_linking.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py 3. ty check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py 4. pytest tests/commands/pr/test_checkout_graphite_linking.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py -x -v
Report all results.
session.assistant: I'll run these checks for you using the devrun agent pattern. Let me execute each command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport...[truncated 78 chars]....py tests/commands/pr/test_checkout_graphite_linking.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py
Check ruff linting violations in specified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr...[truncated 87 chars]....py tests/commands/pr/test_checkout_graphite_linking.py tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py
Check ruff format compliance for specified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py
Check type correctness with ty checker

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on specified test files

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 22 items
tests/commands/pr/test_checkout_graphite_linking.py .......... [ 45%] tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py ............ [100%]
============================== 22 passed in 0.77s ==============================
session.assistant:
Excellent! All checks passed. Here's the summary:
## Check Results
**1. Ruff Linting Check** ruff check passed: All linting rules satisfied across all specified files
**2. Ruff Format Check** ruff format passed: 6 files already formatted correctly
**3. Type Checking** ty check passed: All type correctness checks passed for both checkout and teleport command files
**4. Test Execution** pytest passed: 22 tests passed in 0.77s
### Files Checked - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/checkout_cmd.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/teleport_cmd.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/cmux_checkout_workspace.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/pr/test_checkout_graphite_linking.py - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/pr/test_teleport.py
